title: Vaanam Enna Lyrics Vetri Vizha
stanzas: <div>Vaanam Enna Lyrics Vetri Vizha

Vaanam enna keezhirukku
boomi enna melirukku
sorgamlogam
pakkam vandhathu

dheva gaanam paada paada
thaenum palum oda oda
thendral vandhu
 thaalam thattudhu.

aattamum paattamum
hey nainaa
oattamum thullalum.
hoi hoinaa
yedho ..vegam.. vandhirukka

Vaanam enna keezhirukku
boomi enna melirukku
sorgamlogam
pakkam vandhathu

dheva gaanam paada paada
thaenum palum oda oda
thendral vandhu
 thaalam thattudhu.

kaalai maaai raathiri
kattil meedhu paaiviri
kaama rooba sundhari
kodi kodi sangathi

vaadaa nanbane
velai nalla velaithaan
velai vandhapin veru
enna velaithaan

maalai malligaithaan
solai vandinanthaan
manjal thanthiramthaan
podu mandhiramthaan

neram kaalam
romba romba saadhagam
serum ingae
chinna pennin jaadhagam
vaa vaa kadhal paattedukka.

Vaanam enna keezhirukku
boomi enna melirukku
sorgamlogam
pakkam vandhathu

dheva gaanam paada paada

 thaalam thattudhu.

hey nainaa
oattamum thullalum.
hoi hoinaa
yedho ..vegam.. vandhirukka

boomi enna melirukku
sorgamlogam
pakkam vandhathu

dheva gaanam paada paada
thaenum palum oda oda
thendral vandhu
 thaalam thattudhu.

theeyai pola kaaiyudhu
kanalai pola kodhikkuthu
ambu onnu pattadhu
aadhi andham sutthadhu

yedho niyaabagam
meththa onnu thaeduthu.
ennam aayiram rekkai
katti oaduthu.

aagaa noolidaithaan
aalai kolluthappaa
neela thamaraithaan
nenjai alluthappaa

vaadaa raja
vaalibathai kaattu nee
veenai ingae
kaieduthu meettu nee
vaa vaa kadhal paattedukka

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Vaanam Enna'?

The song reflects themes of nature and harmony, expressing a deep connection between the earth and the heavens.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vetri Vizha'?

In Vetri Vizha, the song is a pivotal moment that showcases the protagonist's introspection and emotional journey.

Who are the singers of 'Vaanam Enna'?

The song features the iconic voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

Who composed the music for 'Vaanam Enna'?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Vaanam Enna' released?

'Vaanam Enna' was released on October 28, 1989.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Vaanam Enna', the lyrics beautifully intertwine themes of nature and spirituality, inviting listeners to reflect on their surroundings. The soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, evokes a sense of nostalgia and peace, making it a perfect backdrop for moments of relaxation and celebration. The harmonious blend of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's voices adds depth to the emotional landscape of the song. Overall, it serves as a reminder of the beauty of life and the connection between the earth and the heavens.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vaanam Enna is a timeless melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and tranquility, beautifully rendered by the legendary voices of Malaysia Vasudevan and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam. The song, composed by the maestro Ilaiyaraaja, resonates with listeners, evoking a sense of peace and reflection. Dive into the enchanting world of Vetri Vizha and experience the magic of this classic tune.
stanzaMeanings: The sky is below, the earth is above, and heaven has come near.
Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
Dance and song, hey friend, movement and joy. Hoi hoinaa.
Something is coming quickly.
The sky is below, the earth is above, and heaven has come near.
Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
In the morning and night, on the bed, love is like a beautiful story.
Come, my friend, good work is here, what else is there after this work?
The jasmine flower has come to the garden, the yellow magic is a spell.
Time is very precious here, the little girl's fate is important.
Come, come, let love be sung.
The sky is below, the earth is above, and heaven has come near.
Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
Dance and song, hey friend, movement and joy. Hoi hoinaa.
Something is coming quickly.
The sky is below, the earth is above, and heaven has come near.
Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
Like fire, it burns, like a flame, it ignites, a spear has struck, beauty is everywhere.
Something is remembered, searching for something. Thousands of wings are flying.
The thread of fate is being woven, the blue lotus is stirring the heart.
Come, king, show your talent, you have brought the veena here, play it well.
Come, come, let love be sung.
The sky is below, the earth is above, and heaven has come near.
Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
Dance and song, hey friend, movement and joy. Hoi hoinaa.

Divine music needs to be sung, and the gentle breeze brings rhythm.
